name: dev-pomogator
description: Canonical Claude Code plugin: skills, commands, hooks, MCP servers — distributed via Anthropic marketplace (/plugin marketplace add stgmt/dev-pomogator)
author: stgmt

scripts.build:mcp: esbuild tools/spec-mcp-server/server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=tools/spec-mcp-server/server.bundle.mjs
scripts.build:gate: esbuild tools/spec-graph/test_quality_gate_stop.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=tools/spec-graph/test_quality_gate_stop.bundle.mjs
scripts.build:guard: esbuild tools/spec-conformance-guard/spec-conformance-guard.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=tools/spec-conformance-guard/spec-conformance-guard.bundle.mjs
scripts.build:push: esbuild tools/spec-conformance-push/spec-conformance-push.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=tools/spec-conformance-push/spec-conformance-push.bundle.mjs
scripts.build:ingest: esbuild tools/spec-backlog/auto-ingest-hook.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --banner:js="import { createRequire as __cr } from 'module'; const require = __cr(import.meta.url);" --outfile=tools/spec-backlog/auto-ingest-hook.bundle.mjs
scripts.build:bundles: npm run build:mcp && npm run build:gate && npm run build:guard && npm run build:push && npm run build:ingest
